Reviews Contact

About Onyx Pool Service

12+ years serving Miami and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Onyx Pool Service began with a simple mission: to provide Miami homeowners with dependable pool care that stands up to our unique coastal environment. What started as a two-person operation has grown into a team serving thousands of pools across South Florida.

We take a proactive approach to pool maintenance, understanding that the salt air, intense sun, and tropical storms require specialized care. Our technicians are trained in the latest techniques for combating algae blooms, salt corrosion, and equipment wear.

As a locally owned business, we're committed to preserving Miami's outdoor living culture. We partner with neighborhood associations and participate in water conservation initiatives to keep our pools beautiful and sustainable.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Onyx Pool Service

Trusted pool service professionals serving Miami, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
